creator: devin.teske@fisglobal.com
text:
In my over-cautious approach to "not change any functionality," (as-per the recent mailing-list thread on -arch) I neglected to actually hook-in the new callbacks.

Please find attached patch.txt that hooks-in the new functionality (required to fix the reported bug).
-- 
Devin
